title: BorderPlugin
description: Expanding the barrier for players to complete advancements.
body:
The plugin increases the world border for completing achievements or discovering new recipes by players. You can configure the maximum limit in the config file and how much the barrier will increase. Also it is possible to display the best players by achievements.

Plugin was written by ChatGPT for PGW minecraft server, i hope that that plugin may help someone.

If you need, i can send you a source code. Discord: wm9k
